title: Love Me and the World Is Mine
writer: Rudolph Hans Bartsch, Imre Fazekas, Ewald André Dupont
actors: Mary Philbin, Norman Kerry, Betty Compson
plot: In Old Vienna in the days prior to The Great War, a beautiful woman, Hannerl, has her choice of two men. The first is a dashing young army officer who can provide blazing romance and little long-time security. The other is an olde...
